name: Vietnam Discovery — Panorama
title: Vietnam Discovery — Panorama
shortDescription: Kick off in Hanoi and journey through Vietnam's most iconic landscapes, from cruising Ha Long Bay to exploring imperial Hue, charming Hoi An and dynamic Ho Chi Minh City.
highlights: Ha Long Bay overnight luxury cruise with kayaking
Imperial Citadel and Thien Mu Pagoda in Hue
Hai Van Pass scenic coastal drive
Lantern-lit Ancient Town of Hoi An
War Remnants Museum and Cu Chi Tunnels
Local cooking class in Hoi An

itinerary.title: Auckland — Hanoi
itinerary.description: Depart Auckland for Hanoi.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Hanoi
itinerary.description: Airport transfer, hotel check-in. Special welcome dinner. Free time to settle or explore.

itinerary.title: Hanoi City Tour
itinerary.description: Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, Temple of Literature. Cyclo ride through Old Quarter. Evening Water Puppet Show.

itinerary.title: Hanoi — Ha Long Bay
itinerary.description: Travel to Ha Long Bay, board deluxe cruise. Kayaking or swimming. Sunset viewing.

itinerary.title: Ha Long Bay — Hanoi — Hue
itinerary.description: Tai Chi session on deck. Sung Sot Cave exploration. Brunch on cruise. Afternoon flight to Hue.

itinerary.title: Hue
itinerary.description: Imperial Citadel, Thien Mu Pagoda, Dong Ba Market.

itinerary.title: Hue — Hoi An
itinerary.description: Scenic coastal drive via Hai Van Pass. Lang Co Beach stop. Marble Mountains visit. Evening lantern-lit walking tour.

itinerary.title: Hoi An Exploration
itinerary.description: Cooking class. Ancient Town highlights: Japanese Covered Bridge, Phuc Kien Temple. Free afternoon.

itinerary.title: Hoi An — Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description: Transfer to Da Nang Airport, flight to HCMC. War Remnants Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, Ben Thanh Market.

itinerary.title: Mekong Delta Excursion
itinerary.description: Boat trip to Cai Be floating market. Traditional workshops. Local homestay experience.

itinerary.title: Mekong Delta — Saigon
itinerary.description: Morning bike ride through villages. Return to Saigon. Free afternoon.

itinerary.title: Cu Chi Tunnels & Free Time
itinerary.description: Cu Chi Tunnels visit (morning). Free afternoon for shopping and sightseeing.

itinerary.title: Departure from Saigon
itinerary.description: Airport transfer for departure flight.

itinerary.title: Arrive Auckland
itinerary.description: Arrive back in Auckland.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach and domestic flights
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
Ha Long Bay overnight deluxe cruise
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $15 per day per person)

name: Vietnam Discovery — Highlights
title: Vietnam Discovery — Highlights
shortDescription: Experience the essence of Vietnam in just 10 in-country days, traveling from Hanoi to Ho Chi Minh City, including Ha Long Bay, Hoi An's lantern-lit streets, Cu Chi Tunnels, and the lush Mekong Delta.
highlights: Ha Long Bay overnight cruise with kayaking and swimming
UNESCO-listed Hoi An Ancient Town with lantern-making workshop
Mekong Delta boat excursion with local workshops
Cultural exploration across Vietnam's major regions

itinerary.title: Auckland — Hanoi
itinerary.description: Depart Auckland, fly to Vietnam.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Hanoi
itinerary.description: Arrive with airport transfer and hosted welcome dinner.

itinerary.title: Hanoi City Tour
itinerary.description: Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum and Temple of Literature. Explore Old Quarter by cyclo. Evening Traditional Water Puppet Show.

itinerary.title: Hanoi — Ha Long Bay
itinerary.description: Travel to Ha Long Bay for overnight cruise. Swimming, kayaking, sunset viewing over limestone karsts.

itinerary.title: Ha Long Bay — Da Nang — Hoi An
itinerary.description: Morning Tai Chi on deck. Visit Sung Sot Cave. Brunch aboard ship. Flight from Hanoi to Da Nang, transfer to Hoi An.

itinerary.title: Hoi An Ancient Town
itinerary.description: Discover UNESCO Old Town, Japanese Covered Bridge, Phuc Kien Assembly Hall. Afternoon lantern-making workshop.

itinerary.title: Hoi An — Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description: Morning to Da Nang, stop at Marble Mountains. Flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Saigon & Cu Chi Tunnels
itinerary.description: Cu Chi Tunnels (underground network from Vietnam War). War Remnants Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, Central Post Office.

itinerary.title: Mekong Delta Excursion
itinerary.description: Boat trip along winding rivers and coconut-fringed islands. Coconut candy workshops, honey tea tasting, traditional folk music. Return to Saigon.

itinerary.title: Free Day in Saigon
itinerary.description: Full day at own pace for shopping, street food tours, or relaxation.

itinerary.title: Departure from Saigon
itinerary.description: Transfer to airport for departure flight.

itinerary.title: Arrive Auckland
itinerary.description: Arrive back in Auckland.

inclusions: Transportation by tour coach and domestic flights
Entrance fees and meals as specified in the itinerary
Ha Long Bay overnight deluxe cruise
exclusions: Transportation and guide services during free time
Meals not listed in the itinerary
Tips (suggested NZD $15 per day per person)
